data.title: Strategy purchased 3468 BTC via STRC today.
data.description: It is estimated that Michael Saylor's Strategy purchased 3,468 BTC through STRC today.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | SPDR Gold Trust Holdings Remain Unchanged at 1,052.419 Tons
data.description: The SPDR Gold Trust, recognized as the world's largest gold ETF, reported no change in its holdings, maintaining a total of 1,052.419 tons. According to Jin10, this stability in holdings comes amid fluctuating market conditions and investor sentiment. The unchanged status reflects the current market dynamics and investor strategies in the precious metals sector.

data.title: Polymarket to Upgrade Protocol and Launch pUSD Token on Polygon
data.description: Polymarket has announced plans to enhance its protocol and introduce pUSD, an ERC-20 collateral token on the Polygon network, fully backed by USDC. According to NS3.AI, the upgrade aims to lower gas costs and minimize failed trades. The platform intends to open-source the smart contracts next week and will initiate a bug bounty program to ensure security and reliability.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $9.0939 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 10th, Eastern Time), XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $9.0939 million. The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a net inflow of $7.6149 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $388 million. The second largest was the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a net inflow of $1.479 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $324 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $968 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.16%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.22 billion.

data.title: A Trump whale may be excluded from Trump's dinner due to the points system.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 600,500 TRUMP from Bybit, worth $1.72 million, possibly to attend Trump's dinner on April 25. However, the whale failed to qualify because eligibility is based on a time-weighted points system from March 12 to April 10.

data.title: Crypto startups raised $76 million in the first week of the second quarter, bringing their total funding to nearly $500 million by 2026.
data.description: According to DefiLlama data, crypto startups raised $76 million in the first week of Q2 2026, bringing their total funding for the year to nearly $500 million. Key funding rounds this week include: Pharos completed a $44 million Series A funding round, with participation from SNZ Holding, Chainlink, and Flow Traders. The company focuses on building high-performance Layer 1 blockchains compatible with Ethereum applications and specializing in RWA and decentralized infrastructure networks. Oh completed a $7.5 million Series A funding round, led by Maven 11, with participation from L1 Digital, Hashed, Auros Global, and Maelstrom. The company focuses on building a Web3 AI platform, providing decentralized AI service tools such as OhChat. Kulipa completed a $6.2 million seed funding round, led by Flourish Ventures and 1kx, with participation from White Star Capital and Fabric Ventures. The project's main business is to provide branded payment cards for crypto wallets, enabling the conversion of digital assets into traditional currency at checkout.

data.title: A U.S. government address transferred 2.4 bitcoins to Coinbase.
data.description: According to Arkham data, a U.S. government address transferred a total of approximately 2.438 BTC to a Coinbase Prime address in two separate transactions approximately 8 hours ago: 0.46 BTC and 1.979 BTC. These funds belonged to Bitcoin previously seized by law enforcement from Glenn Olivio.

data.title: Crypto Startups Secure $76 Million in Funding in Early Q2 2026
data.description:
DefiLlama data reveals that crypto startups raised $76 million in the first week of the second quarter of 2026. According to Odaily, the total funding for the year has approached $500 million. Key funding rounds this week include:

Pharos secured $44 million in a Series A round with participation from SNZ Holding, Chainlink, and Flow Traders. The company focuses on building a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain compatible with Ethereum applications, emphasizing RWA and decentralized infrastructure networks.

Oh raised $7.5 million in a Series A round led by Maven 11, with contributions from L1 Digital, Hashed, Auros Global, and Maelstrom. The project aims to develop a Web3 AI platform offering decentralized AI service tools like OhChat.

Kulipa completed a $6.2 million seed round led by Flourish Ventures and 1kx, with participation from White Star Capital and Fabric Ventures. The company provides branded payment cards for crypto wallets, enabling the conversion of digital assets to traditional currency at checkout.

data.title: NASA Confirms Safe Return of Artemis II Spacecraft
data.description: NASA has confirmed the safe return of the Artemis II spacecraft to Earth. According to Odaily, the mission marks a significant milestone in the ongoing exploration efforts. The successful completion of this mission paves the way for future endeavors in space exploration.

data.title: AI and Web3 Integration Shifts Focus from Hype to Fundamentals
data.description: The integration of Web3 and AI is moving beyond its initial phase. According to PANews, the market's examination of the AI crypto sector is transitioning from early 'conceptual hype' to a focus on 'fundamentals and technological implementation.' During this shift, projects demonstrating strong resilience and technological breakthroughs are reshaping the market's valuation system.

data.title: Iranian negotiating delegation arrives in Pakistan
data.description: An Iranian negotiating delegation has arrived in Pakistan. (Jinshi)

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation has sold 5,000 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the Ethereum Foundation sold all 5,000 ETH for $2,221 each, in exchange for 11.1 million DAI.

data.title: Federal Judge Halts Arizona's Arraignment of Kalshi Over Prediction Market Contracts
data.description: A federal judge has issued a temporary restraining order preventing Arizona from proceeding with the arraignment of Kalshi on 20 criminal charges related to its prediction market contracts. According to NS3.AI, District Judge Michael Liburdi ruled that Arizona cannot conduct Kalshi's arraignment scheduled for Monday, April 13. The order prohibits Arizona from applying its gambling laws to contracts listed on designated contract markets regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). The CFTC, which has filed a lawsuit against Arizona and two other states, contends that these event contracts are considered swaps under federal oversight.

data.title: An account with a win rate of only 43% purchased $200,000 for an NBA regular season game where the Hornets defeated the Pistons.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Hornets vs. Pistons" prediction event, an account with only a 43% win rate (address: 0xe0f01e5ce19e71138a1fc77d3b466f50b7f3bad3) purchased 200,000 units of bets on the Hornets defeating the Pistons, with an average opening price of 66¢. The NBA regular season Hornets vs. Pistons game started at 7:00 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end; the Hornets have a record of 43 wins and 37 losses, ranking 9th in the Eastern Conference; the Pistons have a record of 58 wins and 22 losses, ranking 1st in the Eastern Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Polymarket Sees Significant Bet on Hornets vs. Pistons NBA Game
data.description:
A notable transaction has occurred on Polymarket regarding the NBA regular season game between the Charlotte Hornets and the Detroit Pistons. According to Odaily, an account with a 43% win rate, identified by the address 0xe0f01e5ce19e71138a1fc77d3b466f50b7f3bad3, has purchased $200,000 worth of shares predicting a Hornets victory at an average price of 66 cents.

The game between the Hornets and Pistons began today at 7 a.m. UTC+8. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the Hornets hold a record of 43 wins and 37 losses, placing them 9th in the Eastern Conference. Meanwhile, the Pistons lead the Eastern Conference with 58 wins and 22 losses.

data.title: Offchain Labs Co-Founder Ed Felten on the Future of Layer 2s Amid Ethereum's Mainnet Scaling
data.description: Offchain Labs co-founder Ed Felten expressed confidence in the continued relevance of layer 2 solutions like Arbitrum, even as Ethereum focuses on scaling its mainnet. According to NS3.AI, Felten highlighted that layer 2s can maintain their competitiveness by providing faster response times, reduced block times, and increased throughput.

data.title: Treasury Secretary Advocates for Clarity Act Advancement Amid Senate Review
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has called on the Senate to expedite the passage of the Clarity Act, with Polymarket estimating a 59% probability of its approval by 2026. According to NS3.AI, the White House's Council of Economic Advisers released a report indicating that permitting stablecoin yields would minimally impact lenders' financial outcomes. The Senate Banking Committee is scheduled to evaluate the bill in the closing weeks of April.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 73,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.60% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2026, 22:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 73,000 USDT and is now trading at 72,983.523438 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.60% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Kalshi Users Engage in Event Contracts on NASA's Artemis II Mission
data.description: Kalshi users have been actively trading event contracts related to NASA's Artemis II mission, with trading volume reaching just over $4,000 as of Friday. According to NS3.AI, these contracts speculate on potential statements from NASA officials following the Artemis II splashdown. Additionally, Kalshi has listed contracts suggesting a 63% probability of a NASA manned Moon landing occurring before 2030, and a 41% chance of it happening before 2029.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Wall Street Banks Test Anthropic's Mythos Model for Vulnerability Detection
data.description: Wall Street banks have begun internal testing of Anthropic's Mythos model, as reported by Bloomberg on X. The initiative comes amid encouragement from U.S. President Donald Trump's administration officials, who are advocating for its use in identifying potential vulnerabilities. The Mythos model, developed by Anthropic, is designed to enhance security measures within financial institutions by leveraging advanced AI capabilities. This move reflects a growing trend among major banks to integrate cutting-edge technology to bolster their defenses against emerging threats.
